headline: New Study Finds These Sectors Produce the Most 100-Bagger Stocks
summary: On a recent episode of The Compound and Friends, hosts Josh Brown and Michael Batnick sat down with former Janus analyst Matt Ancrum to discuss his study of 100-bagger stocks. He found that 100-bagger stocks came from all different sectors, but there were some industries that accounted for a lion’s share of the world’s 100-baggers. ... New Study Finds These Sectors Produce the Most 100-Bagger Stocks

headline: Corning Surges 137.4% Year to Date: How to Play the Stock
summary: GLW rides on AI data center demand with expanded U.S. manufacturing and photonics growth plans, but competition and cyclical markets remain risks.

headline: 3 Quality Compounders Worth Your Attention
summary: Quality compounders are flywheels. Said differently, they’re businesses that generate heaps of profits and consistently reinvest them to produce even more profits. Rinse and repeat.

headline: New coalition launches to advance and scale optical connections for AI data centers
summary: 3M (NYSE: MMM) today announced it has joined a group of leading technology companies to establish a new multi-source agreement (MSA) focused on advancing open, interoperable specifications for expanded beam optical (EBO) connectivity in AI infrastructure. Expanded beam optical technology is increasingly seen as a critical enabler for AI infrastructure, offering advantages in reliability, ease of maintenance, and performance in high-density environments.
